summary: KalkMate brand icon SVG (200x200) depicting stylized calculator silhouette, used as website favicon/logo asset.

nodes.label: kalkmate_icon.svg
nodes.description: KalkMate brand icon — a 200x200 SVG with viewBox 835 585 330 555 containing a single transformed group of black filled paths rendering a stylized calculator outline with rows of key cutouts. Standalone vector asset (no script/style); serves as the product logo/favicon in the website's public directory.
